headline: Evercore ISI Initiates Smucker (SJM) on Expectations of Strong EPS Growth
summary: The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) is included among the 11 Best Rising Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 15, Evercore ISI initiated coverage of The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) with an Outperform rating. It set a $117 price target on the stock. The firm said Smucker offers “a compelling valuation with […]
